__warnings.note: 'Month of Mhoro' translated to 'Mhoroの一か月' — kept Shona 'Mhoro' verbatim as brand-signature. Reviewer: confirm consistency with rwen.json's welcome decision.
'First Steps' → 'はじめの一歩'. Standard idiom in Japanese.
Names are playful/poetic in EN ('Three-Day Spark', 'Week Warrior'). Japanese versions are functional — reviewer should rewrite for emotional resonance and natural Japanese app voice.
'Bright Spark', 'Rising Star', 'Constellation' — translated as ひらめき／のぼる星／星座. Reviewer free to substitute equivalent Japanese metaphors (e.g. 流星, 北極星).
'Halfway Tree' is a Jamaican landmark idiom in EN. Used '中間地点' here as the geographic reference doesn't carry. Reviewer: confirm or propose a Japanese cultural anchor (e.g. 半分の道).
'Completed all {{total}} lessons.' rendered as '{{total}}レッスンすべてを終えました。'. Japanese has no plural agreement — placeholder works for any number.
Descriptions use polite-form (〜ました／〜です) for warmth and consistency. Reviewer: confirm tone matches the app's overall voice.
